name: data
description: Scraping tools and data for Blood on the Clocktower Wiki

scripts.scrape:all: pnpm run scrape:tool && pnpm run scrape:github && pnpm run scrape:en && pnpm run scrape:cn && pnpm run scrape:token && pnpm run scrape:reminders:en && pnpm run scrape:reminders:cn && pnpm run build:characters && pnpm run build:special
